# $/stats endpoint
endpoint: admin_stats
classification: spec-required
match_mode: structural-json
ignore_fields: uptime_seconds, total_requests, datasets_count, memory_usage_mb, cpu_usage_percent, active_connections, last_updated, version
description: GET /$/stats returns JSON with `server_name`

=== request
GET /$/stats

=== response
200
Content-Type: application/json

{"server_name":"OxiRS Fuseki"}
